# Competitive Signal Report — Enterprise AI Platform (Saturday, 18 July 2026)

> **Bottom line:** Salesforce's Agentforce is facing significant headwinds with customer traction and product maturity, creating an opening for Kore.ai to highlight our proven enterprise-grade platform and robust analyst validation. ServiceNow's strategic integration of Moveworks and its push into agentic AI for CX present a growing threat, necessitating a clear differentiation on our voice-native capabilities and integrated omnichannel approach.

## Three signals that matter

### Salesforce Agentforce Customer Traction Questioned
**What happened —** Multiple reports indicate that Salesforce's Agentforce product is experiencing weak customer traction, with analysts questioning its maturity and ability to win over clients (2026-07-17) [cio.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxPR3FnWkdmNEtvOXlhTTRsQTBLb0d1OUw2bE5UYXhlQkdtdWZsUldXSzdaUVp1T3huNk52NUpRekhuTjdleU9qUG9VR1otNkRHQ2c0R3pWOW8tNXAycERPUkxVcUgtVDgtbVAwRTZSSUVGYkdFVUJPTWJSR0NMQWtibXlNeWktT0xON3ByZlN0YnQtbDRYcUUwai1JOEc5TFhYU292NkF4T2Q1WkdEa2QzZ0x0aFRxcERhcEVtTkZvQThTY3ZBS0NMYzhtOA?oc=5). A new pay-for-resolution AI model was also introduced for Agentforce Help Agents (2026-07-17) [Cloud Wars](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxQTnlzQ1I3UklfV1g0X2RyM0cwaWp6QWFiVUVjVldqbm1oMERhNExPeDhHNEU3MHpMZ2R1LW5oeVc1WS1XRXRpbDM0Ym5LZHJPeU9wZFI3NE1JZ2hKbExFbnNRRjZFZTBEa2lXalJMZ0tabGJRNWk4TEppSk1xWXFhMk85WUkyN3NmSXJyS3pBRW5kQk92eWdhc1ZwOTJZYzExQkpURkpwbFVwcnRQNm5Ecll3?oc=5).
**What it means for Kore.ai —** This directly validates Kore.ai's positioning as the mature, enterprise-grade platform with proven customer success, contrasting with Agentforce's current struggles. We should emphasize our robust analyst validation and extensive enterprise deployments as proof points against Salesforce's nascent traction.

### ServiceNow Integrates Moveworks, Bolsters Agentic AI for CX
**What happened —** ServiceNow is integrating the recently acquired Moveworks platform into its "Otto" agentic AI offering, aiming to expand its reach across enterprise functions, including CX (2026-07-18) [The Economic Times](https://news.google.?oc=5). ServiceNow is also partnering with Accenture to bring agentic AI to cybersecurity and risk modernization (2026-07-15) [Cloud Wars](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPZU9qUVVHVV8wVnFMZXZjNkQwdVVPdElua0VHdzVVM09kRTR6cEhmeVJSSVdYVTBXNU80LVdXZ2hBQ21SMWlUM21tWTB6ejA3LTcweWZFc3pWNUp5NlNCWVIyVE1GZHlEU2h6dXBRVXFRZmpua2JweF91eUdGRUFiVWs2Z05KRVp4LVNiNXVVekkwYjgxekV6azVHc1JFWUJzSmNtSVVzNzlQekk?oc=5).
**What it means for Kore.ai —** This signals ServiceNow's aggressive expansion into agentic AI across enterprise functions, including CX. We must emphasize Kore.ai's established leadership in voice-native, true omnichannel CX automation and our superior governance and determinism, which are critical for enterprise-grade customer interactions, differentiating us from ServiceNow's ITSM-centric origins.

### Glean Accelerates Enterprise AI with LTM Partnership
**What happened —** Glean has partnered with LTM to accelerate enterprise AI adoption, focusing on integrating enterprise knowledge and buyer signals for revenue teams (2026-07-17) [ETEnterpriseai.com](https://news.google.?oc=5). This partnership aims to speed up enterprise AI adoption by unifying buyer signals and enterprise knowledge (2026-07-17) [APAC Media](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxQQUVRMll5TzNlSVVla1NHUlAzdUE1UVd5SGxWaXQwU2d0Mi0zLVFuT3hLQ1BWZ2laTnlrWjNLMjBNRGVKUnJxUDIxYm53Y3JWSzZEZFhWM1pEaHozNVlOZjZ1WFFLSTBIUDhSQVQ4RWJ2cnpVMmxOSVRBS3J0X1hDZWktaXpyM29sVlZaeTBoLXpMNFh2dEkyc3JJTE05WVJBRi1J?oc=5).
**What it means for Kore.ai —** Glean's focus on enterprise knowledge and buyer signals, while valuable for internal productivity, highlights a gap in customer-facing AI. We can leverage this by emphasizing Kore.ai's strength in true omnichannel customer engagement, integrating knowledge retrieval with proactive, resolution-oriented AI agents across voice and digital channels, a capability Glean does not offer.

## Signal priority table
| Competitor | Move (dated) | Threat | Kore.ai counter |
|---|---|---|---|
| Agentforce (Salesforce) | Weak customer traction and product maturity questioned (2026-07-17) [cio.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxPR3FnWkdmNEtvOXlhTTRsQTBLb0d1OUw2bE5UYXhlQkdtdWZsUldXSzdaUVp1T3huNk52NUpRekhuTjdleU9qUG9VR1otNkRHQ2c0R3pWOW8tNXAycERPUkxVcUgtVDgtbVAwRTZSSUVGYkdFVUJPTWJSR0NMQWtibXlNeWktT0xON3ByZlN0YnQtbDRYcUUwai1JOEc5TFhYU292NkF4T2Q1WkdEa2QzZ0x0aFRxcERhcEVtTkZvQThTY3ZBS0NMYzhtOA?oc=5) | High | Proven enterprise-grade platform with strong analyst validation |
| ServiceNow Agent Platform | Integration of Moveworks and expansion into CX (2026-07-18) [The Economic Times](https://news.google.?oc=5) | High | Voice-native, true omnichannel CX automation and superior governance |
| Glean | Partnership to accelerate enterprise AI adoption (2026-07-17) [ETEnterpriseai.com](https://news.google.?oc=5) | Med | True omnichannel customer engagement vs. internal knowledge focus |

## Watch for
- Continued analyst scrutiny on Salesforce Agentforce's enterprise readiness and adoption metrics.
- ServiceNow's integration progress of Moveworks and its impact on their CX agentic AI strategy.
- Any further expansion of Glean's capabilities beyond internal knowledge management into customer-facing scenarios.

## Recommended actions
- Arm Sales with messaging highlighting Kore.ai's proven enterprise-grade platform and superior analyst validation against Salesforce's current challenges.
- Emphasize Kore.ai's voice-native capabilities and true omnichannel CX automation to differentiate from ServiceNow's ITSM-centric approach.
- Develop content that showcases Kore.ai's ability to integrate enterprise knowledge for customer-facing resolutions, contrasting with Glean's internal focus.
- Continue to monitor and analyze the competitive landscape for emerging threats and opportunities in agentic AI for CX.
